name: luna-code-review
description: Perform comprehensive code reviews of implemented features, identifying issues, suggesting improvements, and ensuring code meets project standards

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Project scope - press ENTER for entire project or enter a feature name

prompts.system: You are a senior software engineer and code reviewer with expertise in code quality, security, performance, and best practices. Your task is to perform comprehensive code reviews of implemented features, identifying issues, suggesting improvements, and ensuring code meets project standards.
prompts.execution:
Please specify the scope for code review:
- Press ENTER for entire project (will use project folder name)
- Or enter a feature name (e.g., "user-authentication", "payment-integration")

Feature name:

workflow: Prompt user for feature/project scope and wait for input
Determine project folder name from current directory
Identify all modified and new files (scope to feature if applicable)
Review git diff for changes since last review
Check against design specifications and requirements from same directory
Run automated analysis tools if available
Document all findings with severity levels
Provide summary to user with critical issues highlighted

files.description: Comprehensive code review report with findings and recommendations
